all.en: The phone rang while Mr. Chen was eating dinner with his family on Wednesday night.
all.zh: 週三晚上，陳先生正和家人吃晚餐時電話響了。

all.en: A polite voice claimed to be calling from the credit card security department.
all.zh: 一個有禮貌的聲音聲稱來自信用卡安全部門。

all.en: The caller said that someone had tried to make a large purchase overseas.
all.zh: 來電者表示有人試圖在海外進行一筆大額消費。

all.en: Mr. Chen felt his heart beat faster as the man described the supposed fraud.
all.zh: 當那名男子描述所謂的詐欺時，陳先生感到心跳加快。

all.en: The voice on the line asked him to confirm his card number and security code.
all.zh: 電話那頭的聲音要求他確認卡號和安全碼。

all.en: Something about the urgent tone made Mr. Chen feel uncomfortable and suspicious.
all.zh: 那種急迫的語氣讓陳先生覺得不舒服又起疑。

all.en: He told the caller that he would hang up and call the bank directly.
all.zh: 他告訴來電者他要掛掉電話，直接打給銀行。

all.en: The man on the other end suddenly became angry and hung up first.
all.zh: 電話另一頭的男子突然發怒，先掛斷了電話。

all.en: Mr. Chen immediately called the official bank number printed on the back of his card.
all.zh: 陳先生立刻撥打了卡片背面上的銀行官方號碼。

all.en: The real customer service confirmed that no suspicious activity had occurred on his account.
all.zh: 真正的客服人員確認他的帳戶沒有任何可疑活動。

all.en: He warned his elderly parents and friends about the scam the very next day.
all.zh: 隔天他就提醒了年邁的父母和朋友提防這種詐騙。

all.en: His teenage daughter helped him save the scam number into a special blocklist.
all.zh: 他十多歲的女兒幫他把詐騙號碼加進一個專用的封鎖清單。

all.en: Mr. Chen also reported the suspicious call to the national anti-fraud hotline.
all.zh: 陳先生也將這通可疑電話通報給全國反詐騙專線。

all.en: The officer thanked him for being alert and shared common scam techniques to watch for.
all.zh: 員警感謝他保持警覺，並分享了常見的詐騙手法供他留意。

all.en: That weekend, he visited his elderly mother to explain the warning signs in person.
all.zh: 那個週末，他親自拜訪年邁的母親，當面解釋這些警示訊號。

all.en: She admitted that she had received a similar call only the previous month.
all.zh: 她坦承自己上個月才接過一通類似的電話。

all.en: Thankfully, she had hung up without giving away any personal information at all.
all.zh: 幸好，她當時直接掛掉，沒有透露任何個人資料。

all.en: Mr. Chen wrote a short safety guide and printed copies for his neighbors too.
all.zh: 陳先生寫了一份簡短的防詐指南，也印了一份送給鄰居們。

all.en: His neighbors gathered in the community hall to discuss recent scam attempts together.
all.zh: 鄰居們聚集在社區活動中心，一起討論最近發生的詐騙企圖。

all.en: Many older residents felt safer after learning what kinds of questions to refuse.
all.zh: 許多年長住戶在學會該拒絕回答哪些問題後，感覺安全多了。

all.en: Mr. Chen realized that sharing knowledge could protect his entire neighborhood from harm.
all.zh: 陳先生體會到，分享知識能保護整個社區免受傷害。

all.en: Mr. Chen volunteered to make weekly safety phone calls to elderly residents living alone.
all.zh: 陳先生自願每週打電話給獨居的長輩，做安全關懷問候。

all.en: He gently reminded each one to never share bank details over the phone.
all.zh: 他溫柔地提醒每一位，絕對不要在電話上透露銀行資料。

all.en: One grandmother thanked him for stopping her from sending money to a strange caller.
all.zh: 一位奶奶感謝他，及時阻止她把錢匯給一位陌生來電者。

all.en: The local police invited him to speak at a community safety awareness event.
all.zh: 當地警方邀請他在一場社區安全宣導活動上分享經驗。

all.en: He prepared a short talk filled with simple examples and practical warning signs.
all.zh: 他準備了一場簡短的演講，內容滿是淺顯例子和實用的警訊。

all.en: Residents took careful notes and asked thoughtful questions during the lively discussion afterward.
all.zh: 事後活絡的討論中，居民們認真做筆記，並提出深思熟慮的問題。

all.en: A young man told him the talk had also saved his grandfather from a similar scam.
all.zh: 一位年輕人告訴他，這場演講也讓他爺爺免於遭遇類似的詐騙。

all.en: Mr. Chen smiled, knowing that one small story could quietly protect many other families.
all.zh: 陳先生微笑著，明白一個小小的故事，能默默守護許多其他家庭。

all.en: He began writing short tips on bright cards and posting them in local shop windows.
all.zh: 他開始在鮮豔的卡片上寫下簡短提醒，貼在當地店家的櫥窗上。

all.en: His quiet courage had grown into a steady shield protecting his entire neighborhood from fear.
all.zh: 他低調的勇氣，已茁壯為一面堅實的盾牌，守護整個社區免於恐懼。
